name: Talk with Nikhil
one_liner: A real-time AI portfolio where people can talk to an interactive version of me.
problem: Traditional portfolios are static and make it hard for people to explore someone's work, story, and thinking naturally.
solution: Build a live, interruptible AI experience that lets users speak with an AI version of me in a terminal-style interface.
why_it_matters: This project combines my interests in AI agents, interactive digital experiences, product storytelling, and systems that feel alive rather than static.

name: ReminoVerse
one_liner: A platform centered on AI voice memories and conversational memory interaction.
problem: Memories and emotional moments are usually stored in static formats that do not feel interactive or alive.
solution: Create a product where users can interact with voice-based memories in a personal and conversational way.
why_it_matters: It reflects my interest in emotional technology, voice interfaces, and more human-feeling digital products.

name: VeriAssess
one_liner: A platform for verified in-person assessment rooms to support fairer hiring processes.
problem: Remote technical evaluation can suffer from trust, identity, and verification issues.
solution: Create a system for verified assessment environments that bring more reliability and trust into hiring workflows.
why_it_matters: This project reflects my interest in verification systems, real-world trust infrastructure, and product ideas that address genuine operational problems.

name: Self-Interview AI
one_liner: A practice interview platform with real-time AI feedback.
problem: Candidates often lack realistic feedback loops when practicing for interviews.
solution: Build an AI-assisted interview practice platform with generated questions and feedback.
why_it_matters: It reflects my recurring interest in learning tools, AI feedback systems, and practical user-facing AI applications.

name: Inbox of Broken Dreams
one_liner: A tool that classifies Gmail job application outcomes like ghosted, interview, or rejected.
problem: Job application inboxes become noisy and emotionally messy, making tracking difficult.
solution: Use AI-assisted classification and workflow automation to organize job outcomes into meaningful categories.
why_it_matters: This project reflects my habit of building around everyday friction points and converting them into useful systems.

name: IsThisRealJob
one_liner: A trust-oriented system for evaluating job postings.
problem: Job seekers often face uncertainty and scams when reading unfamiliar postings.
solution: Create a scoring-based system that evaluates signals of trust and legitimacy.
why_it_matters: It reflects my interest in trust, verification, and helping people make better decisions under uncertainty.

name: AI YouTube Agent
one_liner: An automated flow connecting structured input, prompt generation, AI content processing, and YouTube upload.
problem: Content workflows involve repetitive steps across planning, generation, and publishing.
solution: Automate the pipeline from input to upload using AI-assisted orchestration.
why_it_matters: It reflects my interest in end-to-end automation pipelines that reduce manual work and connect multiple systems together.
